cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.si: Enables/Disables sound effects for Simple Voice Chat audio.
Enables/Disables hearing your own echo with Simple Voice Chat.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.at: Affects how quiet a sound gets based on distance. Lower values mean distant sounds are louder. This setting requires you to be in singleplayer or having the mod installed on the server. 1.0 is the physically correct value.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.re:
The ray distance at which reverb starts.
0.0 disables reverb attenuation.
The brightness of reverberation. Higher values result in more high frequencies in reverberation. Lower values give a more muffled sound to the reverb.
The distance of reverb relative to the sound distance.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.bl: The amount of sound that will be absorbed when traveling through blocks.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.oc: Higher values mean smaller objects won't be considered as occluding.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.de: The default amount of sound reflectance energy for all blocks. Lower values result in more conservative reverb simulation with shorter reverb tails. Higher values result in more generous reverb simulation with higher reverb tails.
The default amount of occlusion for all blocks. Lower values will result in sounds being less muffled through walls. Higher values mean sounds may be inaudible through thicker walls.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.so: Sound distance allowance

Minecraft won't allow sounds to play past a certain distance. This parameter is a multiplier for how far away a sound source is allowed to be in order for it to actually play. This setting only takes effect in singleplayer worlds and when installed on the server.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.ai: A value controlling the amount that air absorbs high frequencies with distance. A value of 1.0 is physically correct for air with normal humidity and temperature. Higher values mean air will absorb more high frequencies with distance. 0 disables this effect.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.un: How much sound is filtered when the player is underwater. 0.0 means no filter. 1.0 means fully filtered
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.ev: Whether sounds like cave, nether or underwater ambient sounds should have sound physics
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.so: Sound blacklist regex
This regex is applied to all sounds that are getting played. If it matches, the sound doesn't get any effects applied to it.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.en: The number of rays to trace to determine reverberation for each sound source. More rays provides more consistent tracing results but takes more time to calculate. Decrease this value if you experience lag spikes when sounds play.

The number of rays bounces to trace to determine reverberation for each sound source. More bounces provides more echo and sound ducting but takes more time to calculate. Decrease this value if you experience lag spikes when sounds play.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.ad: Reduces reflection and reverb ray budgets for distant, looped, and machinery sounds. Direct occlusion and direct gain/cutoff processing are not affected.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.no: If sound hits a non-full-square side, block occlusion is multiplied by this.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.ma: The maximum amount of rays to determine occlusion. Directly correlates to the amount of blocks between walls that are considered.
The amount at which occlusion is capped.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.st: If enabled, the occlusion calculation only uses one path between the sound source and the listener instead of 9.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.so: Sound direction evaluation
Whether to try calculating where the sound should come from based on reflections.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.re: Skip redirecting non-occluded sounds (the ones you can see directly).
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.up: If music discs or other longer sounds should be frequently reevaluated
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.so: Sound update interval
The interval in ticks that moving sounds are reevaluated. Lower values mean more frequent reevaluation but also more lag. This option only takes effect if 'Update moving sounds' is enabled.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.re: Experimental interval in ticks for periodic jukebox/record acoustic updates. Only used in record test modes or when record acoustics are enabled.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.so: Max acoustic sound starts per tick
Limits how many new sound starts receive full acoustic ray processing in one tick. 0 disables throttling.
Max debug rays per tick
Limits how many debug rays are queued in one tick. 0 disables throttling.
Impact burst dedupe
Coalesces repeated same-sound same-position impact bursts for a few ticks.
Dedupe tickable sounds
Allows impact burst dedupe to affect tickable or continuous sounds. Disabled by default to protect machinery loops.
Impact burst dedupe radius
Position radius used when coalescing impact bursts.
Impact burst dedupe ticks
Tick window used when coalescing impact bursts.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.sa: Enables Sable-aware acoustic snapshots and raycasts when Sable is installed.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.fo: Diagnostic switch that ignores Sable acoustic spaces and uses the root world provider.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.sa: Logs sampled Sable acoustic snapshot and cache diagnostics.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.so: Apply acoustics to weather sounds
Allows acoustic occlusion and reverb on positional weather sounds.
Apply acoustics to positional ambient
Allows arbitrary positional ambient loops to receive acoustics. Disabled by default because many ambience loops are global.
Apply acoustics to ambient machinery
Allows known positional ambient machinery loops such as Aeronautics propeller bearings.
Apply acoustics to records

Experimental record acoustics. Disabled by default; use record_test modes before enabling. Record Doppler works in record_test/unsafe; record acoustic muffling uses periodic record updates and is experimental.
Apply acoustics to music
Allows music to receive acoustics. Disabled by default.
Apply acoustics to Crosswind wind
Allows Crosswind global wind loops to receive acoustics. Crosswind howl is not treated as a global loop.
Acoustic sound allowlist
Comma-separated sound ids or class patterns that force acoustic physics after positional safety checks.
Acoustic sound denylist
Comma-separated sound ids or class patterns that skip acoustic physics.
Sound policy debug logging
Logs sound policy decisions for propeller and Crosswind candidates.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.do: Enables pitch shifting based on source and listener motion.
Speed of sound used for Doppler calculations in blocks per second.
Minimum pitch multiplier Doppler may apply.
Maximum pitch multiplier Doppler may apply.
How often active sound pitch is updated.
Smoothing time for Doppler pitch changes in milliseconds.
Apply Doppler to positional block sounds.
Apply Doppler to hostile, neutral, and player sounds.
Apply Doppler to positional weather sounds.
Apply Doppler to ambient sounds. Disabled by default.
Apply Doppler to arbitrary positional ambient loops after ambient Doppler is enabled.
Apply Doppler to known positional ambient machinery loops such as Aeronautics propeller bearings.
Apply manual Doppler diagnostics and pitch control to known Aeronautics propeller bearing loops when safe.
Apply manual Doppler to Sable delegated sounds. Disabled by default because Sable writes OpenAL velocity.
Experimental record Doppler. Disabled by default; use record_test modes before enabling.
Apply Doppler to music. Disabled by default.
Apply Doppler to Crosswind global wind loops. Crosswind howl is not treated as a global loop.
Comma-separated sound ids or class patterns that force Doppler after positional safety checks.
Comma-separated sound ids or class patterns that skip Doppler.
Listener velocity samples above this speed are treated as unreliable.
Source velocity samples above this speed are treated as unreliable.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.pr: Long-range propellers
Extends OpenAL distance parameters for known Aeronautics propeller bearing loops.
Propeller range profile
Propeller tuning profile. Use balanced for gameplay-first defaults, loud for stronger distant props, or legacy for old/current behavior.
Max propeller range
Theoretical maximum audible distance for a reference-size/reference-RPM Aeronautics propeller.
Min propeller range
Minimum theoretical long-range distance for eligible propellers.
Absolute range cap
Hard cap for computed propeller range, preserving technical 1024-block support.
Propeller processing distance
Maximum acoustic processing distance used for propeller-specific long-range processing.
Small fallback sails
Fallback sail count for Aeronautics small propeller bearing loop when reflection cannot resolve size.
Large fallback sails
Fallback sail count for Aeronautics large propeller bearing loop when reflection cannot resolve size.
Reference sail count
Sail count that maps to the maximum size factor.
Reference RPM
RPM proxy that maps to the maximum RPM factor.
Size range exponent
Nonlinear exponent for propeller size range scaling.
RPM range exponent
Nonlinear exponent for propeller RPM range scaling.
Reference RPM pitch
Pitch value treated as reference RPM when real RPM cannot be reflected.
Reference distance fraction
Reference distance as a fraction of computed propeller range.
Min reference distance
Minimum OpenAL reference distance for long-range propellers.
Max reference distance
Maximum OpenAL reference distance for long-range propellers.
Propeller rolloff
OpenAL rolloff factor for long-range propeller sources.
Range in safe mode
Allows propeller_safe mode to keep the source distance extension while bypassing acoustic and Doppler processing.
Crosswind vehicle propellers
Opt-in extension for Crosswind vehicle propeller loops. Disabled by default.
Close gain end
Distance where gameplay gain starts fading from near-field strength.
Mid gain end
Distance where gameplay gain reaches the configured mid-distance gain.
Mid gameplay gain
Extra direct gain multiplier at the mid-distance propeller gameplay point.
Far minimum gain
Minimum extra direct gain multiplier at the far end of propeller range.
Propeller far-field
Applies extra distant filtering and compression to long-range propeller sources.
Far-field start
Legacy distance fraction where propeller far-field filtering begins.
Far-field start blocks
Absolute distance where balanced propeller far-field muffling starts.
Far-field full blocks
Absolute distance where balanced propeller far-field muffling reaches full strength.
Far-field start ratio
Range ratio where propeller far-field muffling starts.
Far-field full ratio
Range ratio where propeller far-field muffling reaches full strength.
Far cutoff at max
Legacy direct high-frequency cutoff multiplier at max propeller range.
Far gain at max
Legacy direct gain multiplier at max propeller range.
Far cutoff minimum
Minimum direct high-frequency cutoff multiplier for balanced far propellers.
Far air absorption bonus
Additional per-source air absorption at max propeller far-field distance.
Compensate high prop volume
Dampen excessive raw propeller source volume at mid and far distances.
Volume compensation strength
Blend strength for high source-volume compensation at distance.
Skip reverb after distance
Distance after which propeller processing skips expensive reverb rays and uses direct and far-field filtering only.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.op: Checks OpenAL error state after selected source writes. Disabled by default because it is expensive on per-source hot paths.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.oc: Provides more information about occlusion in the logs.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.en: Provides more information about the environment calculation in the logs.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.pe: Provides more information about how long computations take.
cloth_config.sound_physics_remastered.re: If enabled, the path of the sound will be rendered in game.
If enabled, occlusion will be visualized in game.
